hero.title: Reliable transfers across the Costa Rican terrain.
hero.subtitle: Professional, grounded, and dependable transit services ensuring you reach your destination with clarity and calm.

routes.catalogSubtitle: Browse our selection of popular transfer routes across Costa Rica. All prices are per person.

quoteRequest.title: Request a Custom Quote
quoteRequest.subtitle: Need a route not listed above? Fill out this form and we'll get back to you with a personalized quote within 24 hours.
quoteRequest.notesPlaceholder: Tell us about your trip, special requirements, or any questions you have...
quoteRequest.successMessage: Thank you for your interest. We'll review your request and send you a personalized quote within 24 hours.

trust.title: Logistics Built on Trust
trust.subtitle: Our operations are designed with meticulous attention to detail, ensuring your transit is predictable, safe, and entirely managed.

localExpertise.title: Local expertise
localExpertise.description: Navigating diverse terrains with veteran drivers who understand the nuances of Costa Rican routes.

safetyProtocol.title: Safety protocol
safetyProtocol.description: Strict maintenance schedules and rigorous driver vetting form the foundation of our operational security.

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmed!
confirmation.message: Your transfer has been booked successfully. We've sent a confirmation email with all the details.
confirmation.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent to your email address.
nextSteps: Check your email for the confirmation details
We'll contact you to confirm the pickup details
Your driver will meet you at the specified location

adminDashboard.title: Dashboard
adminDashboard.welcome: Welcome back! Here's an overview of your business.
